nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Vernon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Vernon in Eure, France, named from the Gaulish element ver(n) ‘alder’ + the Gallo-Roman locative suffix -o (genitive -ōnis).
French: habitational name from the same place as in 1 above or from any of several other places in France with the same name and etymology.

variants.name: Varnon
meanings: English (Leicestershire and Northamptonshire): variant of   Vernon  .

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Richard de Vernon was born in 1120, in Vernon, Eure, Normandy, France, his father, William FitzRichard de Vernon, was 29 and his mother, Lucy Tancarville, was 31. He had at least 1 son with Isabelle Elisabeth DE TANCARVILLE-STIGAND DE MEZIDON. He died in 1173, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard de Vernon est né en 1120, à Vernon, Eure, Normandie, France, son père, William FitzRichard de Vernon, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Lucy Tancarville, avait 31 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Isabelle Elisabeth DE TANCARVILLE-STIGAND DE MEZIDON. Il est décédé en 1173, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard de Vernon 1120 in Vernon, Eure, Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater William FitzRichard de Vernon 29 und seine Mutter Lucy Tancarville 31. Er hatte mit Isabelle Elisabeth DE TANCARVILLE-STIGAND DE MEZIDON mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1173 im Alter von 53 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard de Vernon è nato il nel 1120 nel Vernon, Eure, Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, William FitzRichard de Vernon, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Lucy Tancarville, aveva 31 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Isabelle Elisabeth DE TANCARVILLE-STIGAND DE MEZIDON. Morì nel 1173, all'età di 53 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard de Vernonが1120年にフランスノーマンディエウアバーノンで生まれた時，父William FitzRichard de Vernonは29歳，母Lucy Tancarvilleは31歳であった。彼はIsabelle Elisabeth DE TANCARVILLE-STIGAND DE MEZIDONとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1173年に53歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard de Vernon(이)가 1120년 프랑스 노먼디 우르 베른넌에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William FitzRichard de Vernon(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Lucy Tancarville(은)는 31세였다. 그는 Isabelle Elisabeth DE TANCARVILLE-STIGAND DE MEZIDON(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1173년 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard de Vernon nasceu em 1120, em Vernon, Eure, Normandie, França, seu pai, William FitzRichard de Vernon, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Lucy Tancarville, tinha 31 anos. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard de Vernon родился в 1120 г. в местности вирнон, эур, норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени William FitzRichard de Vernon было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Lucy Tancarville, 31. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Isabelle Elisabeth DE TANCARVILLE-STIGAND DE MEZIDON. Он умер в 1173 г. в возрасте 53 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard de Vernon nació en 1120, en Vernon, Eure, Normandie, Francia, su papá, William FitzRichard de Vernon, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Lucy Tancarville, tenía 31 años.
